title: Messages Tab
text: Messages Tab The Messages tab displays Uniface errors and messages if it can't find an object, or an action is not possible in the current context, or some other problem was encountered. Messages are appended to information that is already displayed in the Messages tab, so you can scroll through the messages received in the current session. The Messages tab displays the most recent 1000 lines of messages. If an error occurs in the Uniface IDE these are first displayed in the Uniface Exception window, but are also copied to the Messages tab. The error information provides the call stack that led to the error and are useful for debugging the IDE. Will it be possible to configure the Messages and Compiler Output tabs? For example, changing the number of lines displayed? Or clear their contents? Configuring the Messages tab Clearing the Messages tab Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
